content.text:
Windsurf has access to PostgreSQL MCP server.  Evaluate the code base and determine whether the Postgres database (DB) is properly and completely configured for Phase 1 (limited to synthetic data generation, offline ML classification, and statistical analysis) of the project.
Consider the following context regarding the current DB.
the live database currently exposes 7 tables in public (alembic_version, video, promotion_log, training_run, training_selection, extracted_frame, run_link) per the query we just ran. The “9 Alembic-managed tables + 3 legacy” figure in the requirements is the target schema documented for Reachy_EQ_PPE_Degree_Mini_01, not the present runtime state; it notes 9 managed tables (4 already migrated, 5 pending) and 3 legacy holdovers, meaning some tables may still be awaiting migration or exist only in other environments. @memory-bank/requirements.md#92-99

If you just need the most important operational tables right now, focus on:

video — canonical metadata for every clip (paths, hashes, labels).
promotion_log — audit trail for temp → train/test moves, including timestamps and intended emotions.
training_run — records each EfficientNet fine-tune, metrics, dataset hashes, MLflow links.
training_selection — captures which videos/frames fed a particular run (joins video to training_run).
extracted_frame — stores per-run frame extraction metadata used for manifests.
run_link — mapping table for dataset/run relationships (e.g., consolidation manifests).
alembic_version — migration bookkeeping (ensures schema revisions stay synchronized).
When the pending migrations land, you should see the remaining two Alembic-managed tables plus any legacy tables (e.g., videos_temp, etc.) if they’re recreated for compatibility. For now, the production DB contains the seven listed above; the “+3 legacy tables” are not present in this environment.
----------------
Let me know if you require advanced, read-only access to the DB.  

Identify pending migrations required for Phase 1.
Recommend updates/improvements to the DB.
Wait for my approval to proceed with any recommendations.

At this point, the goal is to build out the DB so that Phase 1 can be completed.

   366→    __tablename__ = "reconcile_report"

from __future__ import annotations

import uuid
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional

from sqlalchemy import (
    BigInteger,
    Boolean,
    CheckConstraint,
    DateTime,
    Float,
    ForeignKey,
    Integer,
    JSON,
    Index,
    Numeric,
    String,
    Text,
    UniqueConstraint,
    select,
)
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import INET, JSONB, UUID as PGUUID  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column, relationship

from .base import Base, TimestampMixin
from .enums import EmotionEnum, SelectionTargetEnum, SplitEnum

try:  # pragma: no cover - SQLAlchemy 2.0+ provides `sqlalchemy.Uuid`
    from sqlalchemy import Uuid as SAUuid
except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover
    SAUuid = PGUUID  # fallback for older SQLAlchemy versions


class Video(TimestampMixin, Base):
    __tablename__ = "video"

    video_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        primary_key=True,
        default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()),
    )
    file_path: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(1024), nullable=False)
    split: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(SplitEnum, nullable=False, default="temp")
    label: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(EmotionEnum, nullable=True)
    duration_sec: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)
    fps: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=True)
    width: Mapped[Optional[int]] = mapped_column(nullable=True)
    height: Mapped[Optional[int]] = mapped_column(nullable=True)
    size_bytes: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(BigInteger, nullable=False)
    sha256: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False)
    extra_data: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(
        "metadata", JSON, default=dict, nullable=True
    )
    deleted_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True
    )

    promotions: Mapped[List["PromotionLog"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="video",
        cascade="all, delete-orphan",
    )
    selections: Mapped[List["TrainingSelection"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="video",
        cascade="all, delete-orphan",
    )
    label_events: Mapped[List["LabelEvent"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="video",
        cascade="all, delete-orphan",
    )
    extracted_frames: Mapped[List["ExtractedFrame"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="source_video",
        cascade="all, delete-orphan",
    )

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("sha256", "size_bytes", name="uq_video_sha256_size"),
        CheckConstraint(
            """
            (
                split IN ('temp', 'test', 'purged') AND label IS NULL
            ) OR (
                split = 'train' AND label IS NOT NULL
            )
            """,
            name="chk_video_split_label_policy",
        ),
        Index("ix_video_split", "split"),
        Index("ix_video_label", "label"),
    )


class TrainingRun(TimestampMixin, Base):
    __tablename__ = "training_run"

    run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        primary_key=True,
        default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()),
    )
    strategy: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False)
    train_fraction: Mapped[float] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=False)
    test_fraction: Mapped[float] = mapped_column(Float, nullable=False)
    seed: Mapped[Optional[int]] = mapped_column(BigInteger, nullable=True)
    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(32), nullable=False, default="pending")
    started_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True
    )
    completed_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True
    )
    dataset_hash: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True)
    mlflow_run_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)
    model_path: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)
    engine_path: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)
    metrics: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=True)
    config: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=True)
    error_message: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)

    selections: Mapped[List["TrainingSelection"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="training_run",
        cascade="all, delete-orphan",
    )

    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint(
            "train_fraction > 0 AND train_fraction < 1",
            name="chk_train_fraction_range",
        ),
        CheckConstraint(
            "train_fraction + test_fraction <= 1.0",
            name="chk_valid_fractions",
        ),
        CheckConstraint(
            "status IN ('pending', 'sampling', 'training', 'evaluating', "
            "'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled')",
            name="chk_training_status",
        ),
        Index("ix_training_run_status", "status"),
        Index("ix_training_run_created", "created_at"),
    )


class TrainingSelection(TimestampMixin, Base):
    __tablename__ = "training_selection"

    run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("training_run.run_id", ondelete="CASCADE"),
        primary_key=True,
    )
    video_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="CASCADE"),
        primary_key=True,
    )
    target_split: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        SelectionTargetEnum,
        primary_key=True,
    )

    training_run: Mapped[TrainingRun] = relationship(back_populates="selections")
    video: Mapped[Video] = relationship(back_populates="selections")


class ExtractedFrame(TimestampMixin, Base):
    """Frame-level metadata for run-scoped extraction outputs."""

    __tablename__ = "extracted_frame"

    frame_id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    run_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(32), nullable=False)
    split: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(16), nullable=False, default="train")
    frame_path: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(1024), nullable=False)
    label: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(EmotionEnum, nullable=True)
    source_video_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="SET NULL"),
        nullable=True,
    )
    source_video_path: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(1024), nullable=True)
    frame_order: Mapped[Optional[int]] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)
    frame_index: Mapped[Optional[int]] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=True)
    extra_data: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column("metadata", JSON, default=dict, nullable=True)

    source_video: Mapped[Optional[Video]] = relationship(back_populates="extracted_frames")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint("run_id", "frame_path", name="uq_extracted_frame_run_path"),
        CheckConstraint(
            "split IN ('train', 'valid', 'test')",
            name="chk_extracted_frame_split",
        ),
        CheckConstraint(
            "(split = 'test' AND label IS NULL) OR (split IN ('train', 'valid'))",
            name="chk_extracted_frame_test_unlabeled",
        ),
        Index("ix_extracted_frame_run_id", "run_id"),
        Index("ix_extracted_frame_label", "label"),
        Index("ix_extracted_frame_split", "split"),
    )


class PromotionLog(TimestampMixin, Base):
    __tablename__ = "promotion_log"

    promotion_id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    video_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="CASCADE"),
        nullable=False,
    )
    from_split: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(SplitEnum, nullable=False)
    to_split: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(SplitEnum, nullable=False)
    intended_label: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(EmotionEnum, nullable=True)
    actor: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(120), nullable=True)
    success: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False, default=True)
    idempotency_key: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(
        String(64), unique=True, nullable=True
    )
    correlation_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)
    dry_run: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=False, default=False)
    error_message: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    extra_data: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(
        "metadata", JSON, default=dict, nullable=True
    )

    video: Mapped[Video] = relationship(back_populates="promotions")

    __table_args__ = (
        Index("ix_promotion_log_video_time", "video_id", "created_at"),
        Index("ix_promotion_log_idempotency", "idempotency_key"),
    )


# ============================================================================
# New Models for n8n Agent Workflows (Phase 3)
# ============================================================================


class LabelEvent(Base):
    """Audit log for labeling actions (Labeling Agent - Agent 2)."""
    __tablename__ = "label_event"

    event_id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(BigInteger, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    video_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(
        String(36),
        ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="SET NULL"),
        nullable=True,
    )
    label: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(EmotionEnum, nullable=False)
    action: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False)
    rater_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)
    notes: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    idempotency_key: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(64), unique=True, nullable=True)
    correlation_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)
    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=datetime.utcnow,
        nullable=False,
    )

    video: Mapped[Optional[Video]] = relationship(back_populates="label_events")

    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint(
            "action IN ('label_only', 'promote_train', 'promote_test', 'discard', 'relabel')",
            name="chk_label_event_action",
        ),
        Index("ix_label_event_video", "video_id"),
        Index("ix_label_event_created", "created_at"),
        Index("ix_label_event_idempotency", "idempotency_key"),
    )


class DeploymentLog(Base):
    """Tracks model deployments (Deployment Agent - Agent 7)."""
    __tablename__ = "deployment_log"

    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(BigInteger, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    engine_path: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=False)
    model_version: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)
    target_stage: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False)
    deployed_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=datetime.utcnow,
        nullable=False,
    )
    status: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False, default="pending")
    metrics: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict, nullable=True)
    rollback_from: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(500), nullable=True)
    mlflow_run_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)
    gate_b_passed: Mapped[Optional[bool]] = mapped_column(Boolean, nullable=True)
    fps_measured: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Numeric(6, 2), nullable=True)
    latency_p50_ms: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Numeric(8, 2), nullable=True)
    latency_p95_ms: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Numeric(8, 2), nullable=True)
    gpu_memory_gb: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Numeric(4, 2), nullable=True)
    correlation_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)
    error_message: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)

    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint(
            "target_stage IN ('shadow', 'canary', 'rollout')",
            name="chk_deployment_stage",
        ),
        CheckConstraint(
            "status IN ('pending', 'deploying', 'success', 'failed', 'rolled_back')",
            name="chk_deployment_status",
        ),
        Index("ix_deployment_stage", "target_stage"),
        Index("ix_deployment_status", "status"),
        Index("ix_deployment_time", "deployed_at"),
    )


class AuditLog(Base):
    """General audit log for privacy operations (Privacy Agent - Agent 8)."""
    __tablename__ = "audit_log"

    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(BigInteger, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    action: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False)
    entity_type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False, default="video")
    entity_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)
    reason: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    operator: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=True)
    ip_address: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(45), nullable=True)  # IPv6 max length
    user_agent: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)
    timestamp: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=datetime.utcnow,
        nullable=False,
    )
    extra_data: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column("metadata", JSONB, default=dict, nullable=True)
    correlation_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)

    __table_args__ = (
        Index("ix_audit_action", "action"),
        Index("ix_audit_entity", "entity_type", "entity_id"),
        Index("ix_audit_timestamp", "timestamp"),
    )


class ObsSample(Base):
    """Time-series metrics storage (Observability Agent - Agent 9)."""
    __tablename__ = "obs_samples"

    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(BigInteger, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=datetime.utcnow,
        nullable=False,
    )
    src: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False)
    metric: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=False)
    value: Mapped[Optional[float]] = mapped_column(Numeric(15, 4), nullable=True)
    labels: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict, nullable=True)

    __table_args__ = (
        Index("ix_obs_ts", "ts"),
        Index("ix_obs_src_metric", "src", "metric"),
    )


class ReconcileReport(Base):
    """Filesystem/database reconciliation reports (Reconciler Agent - Agent 4)."""
    __tablename__ = "reconcile_report"

    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(BigInteger, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    run_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        DateTime(timezone=True),
        default=datetime.utcnow,
        nullable=False,
    )
    trigger_type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=False)
    orphan_count: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(default=0, nullable=False)
    missing_count: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(default=0, nullable=False)
    mismatch_count: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(default=0, nullable=False)
    drift_detected: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)
    auto_fixed: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)
    details: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSONB, default=dict, nullable=True)
    duration_ms: Mapped[Optional[int]] = mapped_column(nullable=True)
    correlation_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)

    __table_args__ = (
        CheckConstraint(
            "trigger_type IN ('scheduled', 'manual', 'webhook')",
            name="chk_reconcile_trigger",
        ),
        Index("ix_reconcile_time", "run_at"),
        Index("ix_reconcile_drift", "drift_detected"),
    )

"""Initial media mover schema."""
from __future__ import annotations

import sqlalchemy as sa
from alembic import op

revision = "20251028_000000"
down_revision = None
branch_labels = None
depends_on = None

split_enum = sa.Enum(
    "temp",
    "train",
    "test",
    "purged",
    name="video_split_enum",
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
)
emotion_enum = sa.Enum(
    "neutral",
    "happy",
    "sad",
    "angry",
    "surprise",
    "fearful",
    name="emotion_enum",
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
)
selection_enum = sa.Enum(
    "train",
    "test",
    name="training_selection_target_enum",
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
)


def upgrade() -> None:
    op.create_table(
        "video",
        sa.Column("video_id", sa.String(length=36), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("file_path", sa.String(length=1024), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("split", split_enum, nullable=False, server_default="temp"),
        sa.Column("label", emotion_enum, nullable=True),
        sa.Column("duration_sec", sa.Float(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("fps", sa.Float(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("width", sa.Integer(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("height", sa.Integer(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("size_bytes", sa.BigInteger(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("sha256", sa.String(length=64), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("metadata", sa.JSON(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("deleted_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True),
        sa.Column(
            "created_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "updated_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.CheckConstraint(
            """
            (
                split IN ('temp', 'test', 'purged') AND label IS NULL
            ) OR (
                split IN ('train') AND label IS NOT NULL
            )
            """,
            name="chk_video_split_label_policy",
        ),
        sa.UniqueConstraint("sha256", "size_bytes", name="uq_video_sha256_size"),
    )
    op.create_index("ix_video_split", "video", ["split"])
    op.create_index("ix_video_label", "video", ["label"])

    op.create_table(
        "training_run",
        sa.Column("run_id", sa.String(length=36), primary_key=True),
        sa.Column("strategy", sa.String(length=64), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("train_fraction", sa.Float(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("test_fraction", sa.Float(), nullable=False),
        sa.Column("seed", sa.BigInteger(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column(
            "status",
            sa.String(length=32),
            nullable=False,
            server_default="pending",
        ),
        sa.Column("started_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("completed_at", sa.DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("dataset_hash", sa.String(length=64), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("mlflow_run_id", sa.String(length=255), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("model_path", sa.String(length=500), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("engine_path", sa.String(length=500), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("metrics", sa.JSON(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("config", sa.JSON(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("error_message", sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column(
            "created_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "updated_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.CheckConstraint(
            "train_fraction > 0 AND train_fraction < 1",
            name="chk_train_fraction_range",
        ),
        sa.CheckConstraint(
            "train_fraction + test_fraction <= 1.0",
            name="chk_valid_fractions",
        ),
        sa.CheckConstraint(
            "status IN ('pending', 'sampling', 'training', 'evaluating', "
            "'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled')",
            name="chk_training_status",
        ),
    )
    op.create_index("ix_training_run_status", "training_run", ["status"])
    op.create_index("ix_training_run_created", "training_run", ["created_at"])

    op.create_table(
        "training_selection",
        sa.Column(
            "run_id",
            sa.String(length=36),
            sa.ForeignKey("training_run.run_id", ondelete="CASCADE"),
            primary_key=True,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "video_id",
            sa.String(length=36),
            sa.ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="CASCADE"),
            primary_key=True,
        ),
        sa.Column("target_split", selection_enum, primary_key=True),
        sa.Column(
            "created_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "updated_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
    )

    op.create_table(
        "promotion_log",
        sa.Column("promotion_id", sa.Integer(), primary_key=True, autoincrement=True),
        sa.Column(
            "video_id",
            sa.String(length=36),
            sa.ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="CASCADE"),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.Column("from_split", split_enum, nullable=False),
        sa.Column("to_split", split_enum, nullable=False),
        sa.Column("intended_label", emotion_enum, nullable=True),
        sa.Column("actor", sa.String(length=120), nullable=True),
        sa.Column(
            "success", sa.Boolean(), nullable=False, server_default=sa.true()
        ),
        sa.Column("idempotency_key", sa.String(length=64), unique=True, nullable=True),
        sa.Column("correlation_id", sa.String(length=36), nullable=True),
        sa.Column(
            "dry_run", sa.Boolean(), nullable=False, server_default=sa.false()
        ),
        sa.Column("error_message", sa.Text(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column("metadata", sa.JSON(), nullable=True),
        sa.Column(
            "created_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
        sa.Column(
            "updated_at",
            sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
            server_default=sa.func.now(),
            nullable=False,
        ),
    )
    op.create_index(
        "ix_promotion_log_video_time",
        "promotion_log",
        ["video_id", "created_at"],
    )
    op.create_index(
        "ix_promotion_log_idempotency",
        "promotion_log",
        ["idempotency_key"],
    )


def downgrade() -> None:
    op.drop_index("ix_promotion_log_idempotency", table_name="promotion_log")
    op.drop_index("ix_promotion_log_video_time", table_name="promotion_log")
    op.drop_table("promotion_log")

    op.drop_table("training_selection")

    op.drop_index("ix_training_run_created", table_name="training_run")
    op.drop_index("ix_training_run_status", table_name="training_run")
    op.drop_table("training_run")

    op.drop_index("ix_video_label", table_name="video")
    op.drop_index("ix_video_split", table_name="video")
    op.drop_table("video")

    selection_enum.drop(op.get_bind(), checkfirst=True)
    emotion_enum.drop(op.get_bind(), checkfirst=True)
    split_enum.drop(op.get_bind(), checkfirst=True)

"""Migrate emotion labels to strict 3-class policy.

Revision ID: 20260214_000001
Revises: 20251028_000000
Create Date: 2026-02-14
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
import sqlalchemy as sa
from alembic import op

revision = "20260214_000001"
down_revision = "20251028_000000"
branch_labels = None
depends_on = None

old_emotion_enum = sa.Enum(
    "neutral",
    "happy",
    "sad",
    "angry",
    "surprise",
    "fearful",
    name="emotion_enum",
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
)

new_emotion_enum = sa.Enum(
    "neutral",
    "happy",
    "sad",
    name="emotion_enum",
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
)


LEGACY_TO_3CLASS_SQL = """
CASE
    WHEN {col} IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN lower({col}) IN ('angry', 'anger', 'fear', 'fearful', 'disgust', 'contempt', 'sadness') THEN 'sad'
    WHEN lower({col}) IN ('surprise') THEN 'neutral'
    WHEN lower({col}) IN ('happiness') THEN 'happy'
    WHEN lower({col}) IN ('happy', 'sad', 'neutral') THEN lower({col})
    ELSE 'neutral'
END
"""

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def _table_exists(inspector: sa.Inspector, table_name: str) -> bool:
    return table_name in inspector.get_table_names()


def _column_exists(inspector: sa.Inspector, table_name: str, column_name: str) -> bool:
    if not _table_exists(inspector, table_name):
        return False
    return any(col["name"] == column_name for col in inspector.get_columns(table_name))


def _normalize_legacy_labels() -> None:
    bind = op.get_bind()
    inspector = sa.inspect(bind)

    if _column_exists(inspector, "video", "label"):
        op.execute(sa.text(f"UPDATE video SET label = {LEGACY_TO_3CLASS_SQL.format(col='label')}"))

    if _column_exists(inspector, "promotion_log", "intended_label"):
        op.execute(
            sa.text(
                f"UPDATE promotion_log SET intended_label = "
                f"{LEGACY_TO_3CLASS_SQL.format(col='intended_label')}"
            )
        )

    if _column_exists(inspector, "label_event", "label"):
        op.execute(sa.text(f"UPDATE label_event SET label = {LEGACY_TO_3CLASS_SQL.format(col='label')}"))


def _narrow_enum_constraints() -> None:
    # NOTE:
    # Some deployed environments have legacy check constraints with names/types
    # that diverge from alembic metadata expectations. Running batch enum
    # rewrites there can abort the transaction before later compatibility
    # migrations execute. We normalize labels in SQL and leave DDL untouched.
    logger.warning("Skipping enum constraint narrowing due to schema drift tolerance mode")


def _widen_enum_constraints() -> None:
    logger.warning("Skipping enum constraint widening due to schema drift tolerance mode")


def upgrade() -> None:
    _normalize_legacy_labels()
    _narrow_enum_constraints()


def downgrade() -> None:
    _widen_enum_constraints()

"""Add extracted_frame table for run-scoped frame metadata.

Revision ID: 20260223_000003
Revises: 20260218_000002
Create Date: 2026-02-23
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import sqlalchemy as sa
from alembic import op

revision = "20260223_000003"
down_revision = "20260218_000002"
branch_labels = None
depends_on = None


def _table_exists(inspector: sa.Inspector, table_name: str) -> bool:
    return table_name in inspector.get_table_names()


def _index_exists(inspector: sa.Inspector, table_name: str, index_name: str) -> bool:
    if not _table_exists(inspector, table_name):
        return False
    return any(idx["name"] == index_name for idx in inspector.get_indexes(table_name))


def upgrade() -> None:
    bind = op.get_bind()
    inspector = sa.inspect(bind)

    if not _table_exists(inspector, "extracted_frame"):
        op.create_table(
            "extracted_frame",
            sa.Column("frame_id", sa.Integer(), primary_key=True, autoincrement=True),
            sa.Column("run_id", sa.String(length=32), nullable=False),
            sa.Column("split", sa.String(length=16), nullable=False, server_default="train"),
            sa.Column("frame_path", sa.String(length=1024), nullable=False),
            sa.Column(
                "label",
                sa.Enum(
                    "neutral",
                    "happy",
                    "sad",
                    name="emotion_enum",
                    create_constraint=True,
                    native_enum=False,
                ),
                nullable=True,
            ),
            sa.Column(
                "source_video_id",
                sa.String(length=36),
                sa.ForeignKey("video.video_id", ondelete="SET NULL"),
                nullable=True,
            ),
            sa.Column("source_video_path", sa.String(length=1024), nullable=True),
            sa.Column("frame_order", sa.Integer(), nullable=True),
            sa.Column("frame_index", sa.Integer(), nullable=True),
            sa.Column("metadata", sa.JSON(), nullable=True),
            sa.Column(
                "created_at",
                sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
                server_default=sa.func.now(),
                nullable=False,
            ),
            sa.Column(
                "updated_at",
                sa.DateTime(timezone=True),
                server_default=sa.func.now(),
                nullable=False,
            ),
            sa.CheckConstraint(
                "split IN ('train', 'valid', 'test')",
                name="chk_extracted_frame_split",
            ),
            sa.CheckConstraint(
                "(split = 'test' AND label IS NULL) OR (split IN ('train', 'valid'))",
                name="chk_extracted_frame_test_unlabeled",
            ),
            sa.UniqueConstraint("run_id", "frame_path", name="uq_extracted_frame_run_path"),
        )

    if not _index_exists(inspector, "extracted_frame", "ix_extracted_frame_run_id"):
        op.create_index("ix_extracted_frame_run_id", "extracted_frame", ["run_id"])
    if not _index_exists(inspector, "extracted_frame", "ix_extracted_frame_label"):
        op.create_index("ix_extracted_frame_label", "extracted_frame", ["label"])
    if not _index_exists(inspector, "extracted_frame", "ix_extracted_frame_split"):
        op.create_index("ix_extracted_frame_split", "extracted_frame", ["split"])


def downgrade() -> None:

from __future__ import annotations

from sqlalchemy import Enum

VIDEO_SPLIT_ENUM_NAME = "video_split_enum"
EMOTION_ENUM_NAME = "emotion_enum"
SELECTION_TARGET_ENUM_NAME = "training_selection_target_enum"

SplitEnum = Enum(
    "temp",
    "train",
    "test",
    "purged",
    name=VIDEO_SPLIT_ENUM_NAME,
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
    validate_strings=True,
)

EmotionEnum = Enum(
    "neutral",
    "happy",
    "sad",
    name=EMOTION_ENUM_NAME,
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
    validate_strings=True,
)

SelectionTargetEnum = Enum(
    "train",
    "test",
    name=SELECTION_TARGET_ENUM_NAME,
    create_constraint=True,
    native_enum=False,
    validate_strings=True,
)

file.content:
from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime

from sqlalchemy import func
from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column


class Base(DeclarativeBase):
    """Declarative base for Media Mover models."""


class TimestampMixin:
    """Adds created/updated timestamp columns with server defaults."""

    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        server_default=func.now(),
        nullable=False,
    )
    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
        server_default=func.now(),
        onupdate=func.now(),
        nullable=False,
    )

## Findings Report

### 1. ORM Models: Where Are They Used Outside `models.py`?

The five "Phase 3" ORM models (`LabelEvent`, `DeploymentLog`, `AuditLog`, `ObsSample`, `ReconcileReport`) are defined in `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/api/app/db/models.py` (lines 241–391). Usage outside of that file is very thin:

|---|---|---|
| `AuditLog` | 478–486 | `session.add(models.AuditLog(...))` inside the `privacy.redact` endpoint — the only place an audit log row is written via ORM |
| `DeploymentLog` | 575, 582–584, 616 | Queried in `GET /api/deployment/status/{pipeline_id}` and written in `POST /api/deployment/status/{pipeline_id}` |
| `LabelEvent` | Not used in any router/service | Zero application code queries or writes this model |
| `ObsSample` | Not used in any router/service | Zero application code queries or writes this model |

**Tests only (no production usage):**

File: `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/tests/apps/api/test_ingest_endpoints.py` lines 829–920 — all five models are imported and instantiated in unit tests that check model construction only. None of the tests exercise actual DB inserts.

**No usage in:**
- `apps/api/app/services/` — confirmed zero matches
- `apps/api/app/repositories/` — confirmed zero matches
- `apps/api/app/routers/ingest.py`, `promote.py`, `health.py`, `metrics.py`, `dialogue.py`, `legacy.py`, `media_v1.py`, `websocket_cues.py`
- Any Streamlit page (`apps/web/pages/`)

**Documentation/n8n only references** (not executable code): `n8n/workflows/ml-agentic-ai_v.2/detail_parameters_by_function/`, `docs/tutorials/`, `docs/database/`, `n8n/AGENT_SUMMARIES.md`.

---

### 2. `run_link` — ORM Model, Migrations, Code

**No ORM model exists.** There is no `RunLink` or `run_link` class anywhere in `apps/api/app/db/models.py` or anywhere else in the Python codebase.

**No migration creates it.** Searched all of:
- `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/api/app/db/alembic/versions/` (4 migration files: initial schema, 3class migration, hotfix, extracted_frame) — zero mentions of `run_link`
- `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/alembic/versions/001_phase1_schema.sql` — zero mentions
- `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/alembic/versions/002_stored_procedures.sql` — zero mentions
- `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/alembic/versions/003_missing_tables.sql` — zero mentions

**All `run_link` references are documentation only:**
- `CLAUDE.md` — schema snippet in documentation
- `memory-bank/requirements.md` and `memory-bank/BAK_requirements.md` — requirements spec
- `docs/gpt/` — multiple GPT-authored planning docs referencing it conceptually
- `memory-bank/decisions/001-hybrid-storage-architecture.md` — ADR reference

**Conclusion:** `run_link` exists in the live PostgreSQL DB (presumably created by hand or by an old script), but has **no ORM model and no Alembic migration** in the Python-managed migration chain. It is completely invisible to SQLAlchemy.

---

### 3. Table-name References in Services, Repositories, Routers

**Services (`apps/api/app/services/`):** Zero matches for any of the five table/model names. The only services are `promote_service.py`, `video_query_service.py`, and `thumbnail_watcher.py` — none touch these tables.

**Repositories (`apps/api/app/repositories/`):** Only `video_repository.py` exists. Zero matches.

**Routers (`apps/api/app/routers/`):** Only `gateway_upstream.py` contains references — `AuditLog` (one insert) and `DeploymentLog` (reads + insert). The other 8 router files have no references.

---

### 4. `run_link` — Code That Directly Queries It

There is no Python code anywhere in `apps/`, `trainer/`, `jetson/`, `tests/`, or `scripts/` that queries, inserts into, or references the `run_link` table. The n8n workflow JSON files and GPT planning docs mention it conceptually but there are no SQLAlchemy queries or raw SQL strings targeting it in the running application code.

---

### 5. Streamlit Pages — DB Queries and Statistics

There are 6 pages. None of them make direct DB queries; they all go through `api_client` HTTP calls to the FastAPI backend. No page is named "stats" or "statistics" — there is no dedicated statistics page.

| Page | File | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `00_Home.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/00_Home.py` | `api_client.list_videos(split="train")` and `split="temp"` for label balance counters. Upload + promote flow. No direct DB calls. |
| `01_Generate.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/01_Generate.py` | `api_client.request_generation()` only. No video listing. |
| `02_Label.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/02_Label.py` | `api_client.list_videos(split=..., limit=50)` with promote/label actions. |
| `03_Train.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/03_Train.py` | `api_client.list_videos(split="train")` and `split="test"` for counts; `api_client.get_training_status()` (reads `training_run` via ORM); `api_client.prepare_run_frames()`. Closest to a stats page — shows split counts and training run status. |
| `04_Deploy.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/04_Deploy.py` | `api_client.get_deployment_status()` (reads `deployment_log` via ORM); `api_client.update_deployment_status()`. |
| `05_Video_Management.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/05_Video_Management.py` | `api_client.list_videos(split=..., limit=...)` with batch promote. |

**Key finding for your "codex-phase-1-stats-v4" branch:** There is no page that queries `label_event`, `obs_samples`, `reconcile_report`, or `run_link`. The closest thing to statistics is `03_Train.py` which shows split label counts (from `video` table via API) and reads `training_run` status.

---

### Summary of the Critical Gap

| Table | ORM Model | Active Alembic Migration | Application Code Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| `label_event` | Yes (`LabelEvent`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql` — legacy SQL only, and updated by migration 20260214 if the table pre-exists) | Zero — no router/service writes to it via ORM |
| `deployment_log` | Yes (`DeploymentLog`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Yes — `gateway_upstream.py` reads & writes via ORM |
| `audit_log` | Yes (`AuditLog`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Yes — `gateway_upstream.py` writes one row per redact |
| `obs_samples` | Yes (`ObsSample`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Zero — no application code |
| `reconcile_report` | Yes (`ReconcileReport`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Zero — no application code |
| `run_link` | **No ORM model** | **No migration anywhere** | Zero — documentation only |

The five agent tables (`label_event`, `deployment_log`, `audit_log`, `obs_samples`, `reconcile_report`) were created in the live DB by the legacy raw SQL file `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/alembic/versions/003_missing_tables.sql`, which is **outside** the active Python Alembic chain (`apps/api/app/db/alembic/`). That Python chain (4 migrations from `202510280000` through `20260223_000003`) never creates these five tables — it only knows they might exist (migration `20260214` does a conditional `UPDATE label_event` if the column is found).

`run_link` is in an even worse position: it exists only in planning documents and the live DB. No migration file anywhere creates it; no Python code references it at all.

| `04_Deploy.py` | `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/apps/web/pages/04_Deploy.py` | `api_client.get_deployment_status()` (reads `deployment_log` via ORM); `api_client.update_deployment_status()`. |

**Key finding for your "codex-phase-1-stats-v4" branch:** There is no page that queries `label_event`, `obs_samples`, `reconcile_report`, or `run_link`. The closest thing to statistics is `03_Train.py` which shows split label counts (from `video` table via API) and reads `training_run` status.

---

### Summary of the Critical Gap

| Table | ORM Model | Active Alembic Migration | Application Code Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| `label_event` | Yes (`LabelEvent`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql` — legacy SQL only, and updated by migration 20260214 if the table pre-exists) | Zero — no router/service writes to it via ORM |
| `deployment_log` | Yes (`DeploymentLog`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Yes — `gateway_upstream.py` reads & writes via ORM |
| `audit_log` | Yes (`AuditLog`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Yes — `gateway_upstream.py` writes one row per redact |
| `obs_samples` | Yes (`ObsSample`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Zero — no application code |
| `reconcile_report` | Yes (`ReconcileReport`) | **None in Python chain** (created by `003_missing_tables.sql`) | Zero — no application code |
| `run_link` | **No ORM model** | **No migration anywhere** | Zero — documentation only |

The five agent tables (`label_event`, `deployment_log`, `audit_log`, `obs_samples`, `reconcile_report`) were created in the live DB by the legacy raw SQL file `/home/rusty_admin/projects/reachy_08.4.2/alembic/versions/003_missing_tables.sql`, which is **outside** the active Python Alembic chain (`apps/api/app/db/alembic/`). That Python chain (4 migrations from `202510280000` through `20260223_000003`) never creates these five tables — it only knows they might exist (migration `20260214` does a conditional `UPDATE label_event` if the column is found).

`run_link` is in an even worse position: it exists only in planning documents and the live DB. No migration file anywhere creates it; no Python code references it at all.

1→-- Phase 3 Database Schema Migration

    31→

    66→-- General audit log for privacy-sensitive operations
    67→-- ============================================================================
    68→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (
    69→    id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,

    90→
    91→-- ============================================================================

    93→-- Time-series metrics storage for system monitoring
    94→-- ============================================================================
    95→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS obs_samples (

   109→COMMENT ON TABLE obs_samples IS 'Time-series metrics from n8n, Media Mover, Gateway, and Jetson';

   113→-- ============================================================================

   115→-- Stores filesystem/database reconciliation reports
   116→-- ============================================================================
   117→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reconcile_report (

   135→COMMENT ON COLUMN reconcile_report.orphan_count IS 'Files on disk not in database';

   137→COMMENT ON COLUMN reconcile_report.mismatch_count IS 'Files with mismatched metadata (size, hash)';

   139→-- ============================================================================
   140→-- Add 'purged' to video_split enum (required by Privacy Agent)
   141→-- ============================================================================
   142→DO $$
   143→BEGIN
   144→    -- Check if 'purged' already exists in the enum
   145→    IF NOT EXISTS (
   146→        SELECT 1 FROM pg_enum 
   147→        WHERE enumlabel = 'purged' 
   148→        AND enumtypid = (SELECT oid FROM pg_type WHERE typname = 'video_split')
   149→    ) THEN
   150→        ALTER TYPE video_split ADD VALUE 'purged';
   151→    END IF;
   152→EXCEPTION
   153→    WHEN duplicate_object THEN
   154→        -- Enum value already exists, ignore
   155→        NULL;
   156→END $$;

   158→-- ============================================================================
   159→-- Helper Functions
   160→-- ============================================================================
   161→
   162→-- Function to log label events with idempotency
   163→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION log_label_event(
   164→    p_video_id UUID,
   165→    p_label emotion_label,
   166→    p_action VARCHAR,
   167→    p_rater_id VARCHAR DEFAULT NULL,
   168→    p_notes TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
   169→    p_idempotency_key VARCHAR DEFAULT NULL,
   170→    p_correlation_id UUID DEFAULT NULL
   171→)
   172→RETURNS BIGINT AS $$
   173→DECLARE
   174→    v_event_id BIGINT;
   175→BEGIN
   176→    -- Check idempotency
   177→    IF p_idempotency_key IS NOT NULL THEN
   178→        SELECT event_id INTO v_event_id
   179→        FROM label_event
   180→        WHERE idempotency_key = p_idempotency_key;
   181→        
   182→        IF FOUND THEN
   183→            RETURN v_event_id;  -- Return existing event ID
   184→        END IF;
   185→    END IF;
   186→    
   187→    -- Insert new event
   188→    INSERT INTO label_event (
   189→        video_id, label, action, rater_id, notes, 
   190→        idempotency_key, correlation_id
   191→    ) VALUES (
   192→        p_video_id, p_label, p_action, p_rater_id, p_notes,
   193→        p_idempotency_key, p_correlation_id
   194→    ) RETURNING event_id INTO v_event_id;
   195→    
   196→    RETURN v_event_id;
   197→END;
   198→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   199→
   200→-- Function to log deployment with metrics
   201→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION log_deployment(
   202→    p_engine_path VARCHAR,
   203→    p_target_stage VARCHAR,
   204→    p_model_version VARCHAR DEFAULT NULL,
   205→    p_mlflow_run_id VARCHAR DEFAULT NULL,
   206→    p_metrics JSONB DEFAULT '{}'
   207→)
   208→RETURNS BIGINT AS $$
   209→DECLARE
   210→    v_deployment_id BIGINT;
   211→BEGIN
   212→    INSERT INTO deployment_log (
   213→        engine_path, target_stage, model_version, 
   214→        mlflow_run_id, status, metrics
   215→    ) VALUES (
   216→        p_engine_path, p_target_stage, p_model_version,
   217→        p_mlflow_run_id, 'pending', p_metrics
   218→    ) RETURNING id INTO v_deployment_id;
   219→    
   220→    RETURN v_deployment_id;
   221→END;
   222→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   223→
   224→-- Function to update deployment status with Gate B metrics
   225→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_deployment_status(
   226→    p_deployment_id BIGINT,
   227→    p_status VARCHAR,
   228→    p_fps NUMERIC DEFAULT NULL,
   229→    p_latency_p50 NUMERIC DEFAULT NULL,
   230→    p_latency_p95 NUMERIC DEFAULT NULL,
   231→    p_gpu_memory NUMERIC DEFAULT NULL,
   232→    p_error_message TEXT DEFAULT NULL
   233→)
   234→RETURNS VOID AS $$
   235→DECLARE
   236→    v_gate_b_passed BOOLEAN;
   237→BEGIN
   238→    -- Check Gate B requirements if metrics provided
   239→    IF p_fps IS NOT NULL AND p_latency_p50 IS NOT NULL THEN
   240→        v_gate_b_passed := (
   241→            p_fps >= 25 AND 
   242→            p_latency_p50 <= 120 AND 
   243→            COALESCE(p_gpu_memory, 0) <= 2.5
   244→        );
   245→    END IF;
   246→    
   247→    UPDATE deployment_log SET
   248→        status = p_status,
   249→        fps_measured = p_fps,
   250→        latency_p50_ms = p_latency_p50,
   251→        latency_p95_ms = p_latency_p95,
   252→        gpu_memory_gb = p_gpu_memory,
   253→        gate_b_passed = v_gate_b_passed,
   254→        error_message = p_error_message
   255→    WHERE id = p_deployment_id;
   256→END;
   257→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

   274→    ) VALUES (
   275→        p_action, p_entity_type, p_entity_id, p_reason, p_operator, p_metadata
   276→    ) RETURNING id INTO v_audit_id;
   277→    
   278→    RETURN v_audit_id;

   282→-- Function to record observability sample

   284→    p_src VARCHAR,
   285→    p_metric VARCHAR,

   288→)

   294→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

content.text:
Here's my complete assessment.

---

## Database Evaluation for Phase 1

### Current State Summary

**Live DB (7 tables):** `alembic_version`, `video`, `promotion_log`, `training_run`, `training_selection`, `extracted_frame`, `run_link`

**Active Alembic chain** ([apps/api/app/db/alembic/](apps/api/app/db/alembic/) — 4 Python migrations):
1. `202510280000` — Initial schema (video, training_run, training_selection, promotion_log)
2. `20260214_000001` — 3-class emotion label normalization
3. `20260218_000002` — Schema compat hotfix (backfills missing columns)
4. `20260223_000003` — extracted_frame table

**Legacy SQL** ([alembic/versions/](alembic/versions/) — 3 `.sql` files, outside Python chain):
- `001_phase1_schema.sql` — marked DEPRECATED, but was originally run against live DB
- `002_stored_procedures.sql` — helper functions
- `003_missing_tables.sql` — creates 5 agent tables + stored functions (Phase 3 scope)

**ORM models** ([apps/api/app/db/models.py](apps/api/app/db/models.py)): 10 model classes total

---

### Phase 1 Scope Reminder
Phase 1 = synthetic data generation, offline ML classification, statistical analysis. This means:
- Video ingest, labeling, promotion
- Training run management, frame extraction
- Dataset statistics and analysis
- MLflow lineage tracking

---

### Gap Analysis: What's Missing for Phase 1?

#### 1. `label_event` — **NEEDED for Phase 1** (No Alembic migration)

**Why it matters:** Phase 1 includes human-in-the-loop labeling. Every label action (assign, relabel, discard) should be auditable. The ORM model exists (`LabelEvent` in [models.py:241](apps/api/app/db/models.py#L241)) but:
- No Python Alembic migration creates the table
- It was created by legacy `003_missing_tables.sql` (which used `emotion_label` native enum, not the ORM's `VARCHAR` check constraint)
- Zero application code writes to it — the label/promote routes don't record events
- **Schema mismatch**: legacy SQL uses `UUID` for `video_id`; ORM uses `String(36)`. Legacy SQL uses native `emotion_label` enum; ORM uses `VARCHAR` check constraint.

**Status:** Table exists in live DB (from legacy SQL) but is unused and has schema drift from the ORM model.

#### 2. `run_link` — **NEEDED for Phase 1** (No ORM model, no migration)

**Why it matters:** Requirements spec ([requirements.md:427-433](memory-bank/requirements.md#L427-L433)) defines `run_link` for MLflow lineage — tying `mlflow_run_id` to `dataset_hash` and optional `snapshot_ref`. This is core Phase 1 traceability.
- Exists in live DB (presumably created manually or by old script)
- No ORM model anywhere in the codebase
- No migration (Python or SQL) creates it
- No application code references it

**Status:** Ghost table — exists in DB but invisible to the application.

#### 3. Missing Alembic migrations for 5 ORM models

These 5 models exist in [models.py](apps/api/app/db/models.py) but have no Python Alembic migration:

| Model | Table | Phase 1 Need? | Notes |
|-------|-------|:---:|-------|
| `LabelEvent` | `label_event` | **Yes** | Labeling audit trail |
| `DeploymentLog` | `deployment_log` | No | Phase 3 (Jetson deployment) |
| `AuditLog` | `audit_log` | Partial | Privacy ops — useful but not blocking |
| `ObsSample` | `obs_samples` | No | Phase 3 observability |
| `ReconcileReport` | `reconcile_report` | No | Phase 3 reconciler agent |

#### 4. `video` table — Split enum gap

The ORM's `SplitEnum` in [enums.py](apps/api/app/db/enums.py) defines: `temp`, `train`, `test`, `purged`

But the legacy SQL schema created the live DB with a native `video_split` enum including `dataset_all`. The check constraint in the ORM model ([models.py:79-87](apps/api/app/db/models.py#L79-L87)) only allows `temp`, `test`, `purged`, and `train`. If any legacy rows have `split='dataset_all'`, they'd violate the ORM constraint.

**Risk:** Low if the 3-class migration already cleaned this up, but worth verifying.

#### 5. No `updated_at` trigger in Alembic chain

The legacy `001_phase1_schema.sql` created a `update_updated_at()` trigger function and applied it to `video` and `training_run`. The Python Alembic chain doesn't create this trigger — it relies on SQLAlchemy's `onupdate=func.now()` in the `TimestampMixin` ([base.py:22](apps/api/app/db/base.py#L22)), which only fires from ORM updates, not raw SQL or other clients.

#### 6. No statistics-oriented views or indices

For Phase 1 statistical analysis, the DB has no:
- Materialized views for label distribution
- Composite indices for common stats queries (e.g., `(split, label)` on `video`, `(run_id, label)` on `extracted_frame`)
- No aggregation helpers for training metrics across runs

---

### Recommendations

I recommend these changes, grouped by priority:

#### Priority 1 — Required for Phase 1 Completion

**R1. Create Alembic migration for `label_event`**
- Bring the live table under Python Alembic control
- Reconcile schema drift (UUID vs String(36), native enum vs check constraint)
- Wire `LabelEvent` writes into the label and promote endpoints

**R2. Create `RunLink` ORM model + Alembic migration**
- Add ORM model matching the requirements spec schema
- Create migration that handles the existing live table gracefully (`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS`)
- Wire into training pipeline to record MLflow lineage

**R3. Add composite index `(split, label)` on `video`**
- Frequently queried pattern for statistics (label balance, split counts)
- Currently only individual indices exist

**R4. Add composite index `(run_id, label)` on `extracted_frame`**
- Per-run label distribution queries are core to training stats

#### Priority 2 — Strongly Recommended

**R5. Create Alembic migration for `audit_log`**
- Already referenced by `gateway_upstream.py` (writes AuditLog rows)
- Currently relies on legacy SQL table — one schema drift away from breaking

**R6. Verify and clean `dataset_all` split values**
- Check if any `video` rows still have `split='dataset_all'` from legacy schema
- If so, migrate them to `train` with appropriate label assignment

**R7. Add `updated_at` trigger via Alembic**
- Ensures `updated_at` is maintained regardless of how updates happen (ORM, raw SQL, psql)

#### Priority 3 — Nice to Have for Phase 1

**R8. Defer `deployment_log`, `obs_samples`, `reconcile_report` migrations**
- These are Phase 3 tables. The ORM models can stay in code, but creating formal Alembic migrations now adds maintenance burden without Phase 1 value.

**R9. Create a statistics view or helper**
- Materialized view combining video counts by split/label with training run metrics
- Useful for the Streamlit stats page that will need to be built

**R10. Deprecate legacy SQL migration files**
- Mark `002_stored_procedures.sql` and `003_missing_tables.sql` as deprecated (like `001` already is)
- The stored functions from those files are not called by any application code

---

### Summary Table

| # | Action | Scope | Tables Affected |
|---|--------|-------|-----------------|
| R1 | Alembic migration for `label_event` | **Phase 1** | `label_event` |
| R2 | ORM model + migration for `run_link` | **Phase 1** | `run_link` |
| R3 | Composite index `(split, label)` on `video` | **Phase 1** | `video` |
| R4 | Composite index `(run_id, label)` on `extracted_frame` | **Phase 1** | `extracted_frame` |
| R5 | Alembic migration for `audit_log` | Recommended | `audit_log` |
| R6 | Clean `dataset_all` split values | Recommended | `video` |
| R7 | `updated_at` trigger via Alembic | Recommended | `video`, `training_run` |
| R8 | Defer Phase 3 table migrations | Housekeeping | — |
| R9 | Statistics view/helper | Nice-to-have | — |
| R10 | Deprecate legacy SQL files | Housekeeping | — |

---

Awaiting your approval before proceeding with any of these. Let me know which recommendations you'd like me to implement, or if you'd like me to adjust scope.

460→        deleted_file = True
   461→    if thumb_path.exists() and thumb_path.is_file():
   462→        thumb_path.unlink()
   463→        deleted_thumb = True
   464→
   465→    metadata = dict(video.extra_data or {})
   466→    if reason:
   467→        metadata["redact_reason"] = reason
   468→    if correlation_id:
   469→        metadata["correlation_id"] = correlation_id

   471→    video.split = "purged"

   473→    video.deleted_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   474→    video.file_path = f"purged/{video_id}.mp4"
   475→    video.extra_data = metadata
   476→
   477→    session.add(
   478→        models.AuditLog(
   479→            action="privacy.redact",
   480→            entity_type="video",
   481→            entity_id=video_id,
   482→            reason=reason,
   483→            correlation_id=correlation_id,
   484→            extra_data={"deleted_file": deleted_file, "deleted_thumb": deleted_thumb},
   485→        )
   486→    )
   487→    await session.commit()
   488→
   489→    return {
   490→        "status": "accepted",
   491→        "video_id": video_id,
   492→        "deleted_file": deleted_file,
   493→        "deleted_thumb": deleted_thumb,
   494→        "correlation_id": correlation_id,
   495→    }
   496→
   497→
   498→@router.get("/api/training/status/{pipeline_id}")
   499→async def get_training_status(
   500→    pipeline_id: str,
   501→    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   502→) -> Dict[str, object]:
   503→    """Get persisted training status from DB."""
   504→    if pipeline_id == "latest":
   505→        stmt = select(models.TrainingRun).order_by(desc(models.TrainingRun.updated_at)).limit(1)
   506→        row = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().first()
   507→        if row is None:
   508→            return {"status": "unknown"}
   509→    else:
   510→        run_id = _validate_pipeline_id(pipeline_id)
   511→        row = await session.get(models.TrainingRun, run_id)
   512→        if row is None:
   513→            return {"status": "unknown"}
   514→
   515→    return {
   516→        "run_id": row.run_id,
   517→        "status": row.status,
   518→        "started_at": row.started_at.isoformat() if row.started_at else None,
   519→        "completed_at": row.completed_at.isoformat() if row.completed_at else None,
   520→        "metrics": row.metrics or {},
   521→        "error_message": row.error_message,
   522→        "updated_at": row.updated_at.isoformat() if row.updated_at else None,
   523→    }
   524→
   525→
   526→@router.post("/api/training/status/{pipeline_id}")
   527→async def update_training_status(
   528→    pipeline_id: str,
   529→    payload: Dict[str, object],
   530→    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   531→) -> Dict[str, object]:
   532→    """Persist training status updates to DB."""
   533→    run_id = _validate_pipeline_id(pipeline_id)
   534→    row = await session.get(models.TrainingRun, run_id)
   535→
   536→    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   537→    if row is None:
   538→        row = models.TrainingRun(
   539→            run_id=run_id,
   540→            strategy=str(payload.get("strategy") or "status_update"),
   541→            train_fraction=0.5,
   542→            test_fraction=0.5,
   543→            status=str(payload.get("status") or "pending"),
   544→            started_at=now if str(payload.get("status")) in {"pending", "sampling", "training", "evaluating"} else None,
   545→            metrics=dict(payload.get("metrics") or {}),
   546→            error_message=payload.get("error_message"),
   547→        )
   548→        session.add(row)
   549→    else:
   550→        if "status" in payload:
   551→            row.status = str(payload.get("status") or row.status)
   552→        if "metrics" in payload and isinstance(payload.get("metrics"), dict):
   553→            merged = dict(row.metrics or {})
   554→            merged.update(payload.get("metrics") or {})
   555→            row.metrics = merged
   556→        if "error_message" in payload:
   557→            row.error_message = str(payload.get("error_message")) if payload.get("error_message") else None
   558→        if row.started_at is None and row.status in {"pending", "sampling", "training", "evaluating"}:
   559→            row.started_at = now
   560→
   561→    if row.status in {"completed", "failed", "cancelled"} and row.completed_at is None:
   562→        row.completed_at = now
   563→
   564→    await session.commit()
   565→    return {"status": "updated", "run_id": run_id}
   566→
   567→
   568→@router.get("/api/deployment/status/{pipeline_id}")
   569→async def get_deployment_status(
   570→    pipeline_id: str,
   571→    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   572→) -> Dict[str, object]:
   573→    """Get persisted deployment status from DB."""
   574→    if pipeline_id == "latest":
   575→        stmt = select(models.DeploymentLog).order_by(desc(models.DeploymentLog.deployed_at)).limit(1)
   576→        row = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().first()
   577→        if row is None:
   578→            return {"status": "unknown"}
   579→    else:
   580→        pid = _validate_pipeline_id(pipeline_id)
   581→        stmt = (
   582→            select(models.DeploymentLog)
   583→            .where(models.DeploymentLog.correlation_id == pid)
   584→            .order_by(desc(models.DeploymentLog.deployed_at))
   585→            .limit(1)
   586→        )
   587→        row = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalars().first()
   588→        if row is None:
   589→            return {"status": "unknown"}
   590→
   591→    return {
   592→        "pipeline_id": row.correlation_id,
   593→        "status": row.status,
   594→        "target_stage": row.target_stage,
   595→        "engine_path": row.engine_path,
   596→        "model_version": row.model_version,
   597→        "gate_b_passed": row.gate_b_passed,
   598→        "fps_measured": float(row.fps_measured) if row.fps_measured is not None else None,
   599→        "latency_p50_ms": float(row.latency_p50_ms) if row.latency_p50_ms is not None else None,
   600→        "latency_p95_ms": float(row.latency_p95_ms) if row.latency_p95_ms is not None else None,
   601→        "gpu_memory_gb": float(row.gpu_memory_gb) if row.gpu_memory_gb is not None else None,
   602→        "error_message": row.error_message,
   603→        "deployed_at": row.deployed_at.isoformat() if row.deployed_at else None,
   604→    }
   605→
   606→
   607→@router.post("/api/deployment/status/{pipeline_id}")
   608→async def update_deployment_status(
   609→    pipeline_id: str,
   610→    payload: Dict[str, object],
   611→    session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
   612→) -> Dict[str, object]:
   613→    """Persist deployment status updates to DB as log entries."""
   614→    pid = _validate_pipeline_id(pipeline_id)
   615→    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
   616→    row = models.DeploymentLog(
   617→        engine_path=str(payload.get("engine_path") or "unknown://engine"),
   618→        model_version=str(payload.get("model_version")) if payload.get("model_version") else None,
   619→        target_stage=str(payload.get("target_stage") or "shadow"),
   620→        deployed_at=now,
   621→        status=str(payload.get("status") or "pending"),
   622→        metrics=dict(payload.get("metrics") or {}),
   623→        rollback_from=str(payload.get("rollback_from")) if payload.get("rollback_from") else None,
   624→        mlflow_run_id=str(payload.get("mlflow_run_id")) if payload.get("mlflow_run_id") else None,
   625→        gate_b_passed=payload.get("gate_b_passed"),
   626→        fps_measured=payload.get("fps_measured"),
   627→        latency_p50_ms=payload.get("latency_p50_ms"),
   628→        latency_p95_ms=payload.get("latency_p95_ms"),
   629→        gpu_memory_gb=payload.get("gpu_memory_gb"),
   630→        correlation_id=pid,
   631→        error_message=str(payload.get("error_message")) if payload.get("error_message") else None,
   632→    )
   633→    session.add(row)
   634→    await session.commit()
   635→    return {"status": "updated", "pipeline_id": pid}
   636→

1→from __future__ import annotations
     2→
     3→import uuid
     4→from collections import Counter
     5→from typing import Any, Dict
     6→
     7→import streamlit as st
     8→
     9→from apps.web import api_client
    10→
    11→st.set_page_config(page_title="Training", layout="wide")
    12→st.title("03 - Training")
    13→
    14→
    15→def _items_for_split(split: str) -> list[dict]:
    16→    items: list[dict] = []
    17→    offset = 0
    18→    page_limit = 10
    19→    while True:
    20→        data = api_client.list_videos(split=split, limit=page_limit, offset=offset)
    21→        raw_items = data.get("items", []) if isinstance(data, dict) else []
    22→        if not isinstance(raw_items, list):
    23→            break
    24→        batch = [it for it in raw_items if isinstance(it, dict)]
    25→        items.extend(batch)
    26→        if not data.get("has_more"):
    27→            break
    28→        offset += len(batch)
    29→        if not batch:
    30→            break
    31→    return items
    32→
    33→
    34→def _as_dict(value: Any) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    35→    return value if isinstance(value, dict) else {}
    36→
    37→
    38→def _resolve_label(item: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
    39→    raw_label = item.get("label")
    40→    if isinstance(raw_label, str):
    41→        normalized = raw_label.strip().lower()
    42→        if normalized in {"happy", "sad", "neutral"}:
    43→            return normalized
    44→
    45→    file_path = item.get("file_path")
    46→    if isinstance(file_path, str):
    47→        parts = file_path.split("/")
    48→        if len(parts) >= 2 and parts[0] == "train" and parts[1] in {"happy", "sad", "neutral"}:
    49→            return parts[1]
    50→        name = parts[-1].lower()
    51→        for label in ("happy", "sad", "neutral"):
    52→            if name.startswith(f"{label}_"):
    53→                return label
    54→    return "unlabeled"
    55→
    56→
    57→def _render_status_panel(title: str, payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    58→    st.markdown(f"**{title}**")
    59→    status = str(payload.get("status") or "unknown").lower()
    60→    metrics = _as_dict(payload.get("metrics"))
    61→    error_message = payload.get("error_message")
    62→    blocked_reason = metrics.get("blocked_reason")
    63→
    64→    if status == "blocked":
    65→        st.warning(f"Blocked: {blocked_reason or 'pipeline gate not satisfied'}")
    66→    elif status in {"completed", "completed_gate_passed", "completed_gate_failed"}:
    67→        st.success(f"Completed ({status})")
    68→    elif status in {"training", "evaluating", "pending", "sampling", "running"}:
    69→        st.info(f"In progress ({status})")
    70→    elif status in {"failed", "error", "cancelled"}:
    71→        st.error(f"Failed ({status})")
    72→    else:
    73→        st.caption(f"Status: {status}")
    74→
    75→    if status == "blocked":
    76→        counts = _as_dict(metrics.get("counts"))
    77→        min_required = metrics.get("min_required_per_class")
    78→        if counts:
    79→            st.caption(
    80→                "Test counts "
    81→                f"(happy={counts.get('happy', 0)}, sad={counts.get('sad', 0)}, neutral={counts.get('neutral', 0)})"
    82→            )
    83→        if min_required is not None:
    84→            st.caption(f"Minimum required per class: {min_required}")
    85→
    86→    if error_message:
    87→        st.caption(f"Error: {error_message}")
    88→
    89→    st.json(payload)
    90→
    91→
    92→col1, col2 = st.columns(2)
    93→with col1:
    94→    try:
    95→        train_items = _items_for_split("train")
    96→        train_counts = Counter(_resolve_label(it) for it in train_items)
    97→        st.subheader("Train Split")
    98→        st.metric("Total", len(train_items))
    99→        st.json(dict(train_counts))
   100→    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   101→        st.error(f"Failed to load train split: {exc}")
   102→
   103→with col2:
   104→    try:
   105→        test_items = _items_for_split("test")
   106→        test_counts = Counter((it.get("label") or "no_label") for it in test_items)
   107→        st.subheader("Test Split")
   108→        st.metric("Total", len(test_items))
   109→        st.json(dict(test_counts))
   110→    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   111→        st.error(f"Failed to load test split: {exc}")
   112→
   113→st.divider()
   114→st.subheader("Manifest + Frame Extraction")
   115→
   116→if "train_run_id" not in st.session_state:
   117→    st.session_state["train_run_id"] = ""
   118→if "prepare_split_run" not in st.session_state:
   119→    st.session_state["prepare_split_run"] = False
   120→if "prepare_split_train_ratio" not in st.session_state:
   121→    st.session_state["prepare_split_train_ratio"] = 0.9
   122→if "prepare_strip_valid_labels" not in st.session_state:
   123→    st.session_state["prepare_strip_valid_labels"] = True
   124→if "prepare_persist_valid_metadata" not in st.session_state:
   125→    st.session_state["prepare_persist_valid_metadata"] = True
   126→if "prepare_face_crop" not in st.session_state:
   127→    st.session_state["prepare_face_crop"] = False
   128→if "prepare_face_confidence" not in st.session_state:
   129→    st.session_state["prepare_face_confidence"] = 0.6
   130→
   131→run_id = st.text_input("Run ID (run_xxxx, optional)", key="train_run_id")
   132→sample_fraction = st.slider(
   133→    "Train fraction (compat metadata)",
   134→    min_value=0.1,
   135→    max_value=1.0,
   136→    value=0.8,
   137→    step=0.1,
   138→)
   139→dry_run = st.toggle("Dry run", value=True)
   140→face_crop = st.toggle(
   141→    "Enable face-crop extraction (OpenCV DNN)",
   142→    key="prepare_face_crop",
   143→    help="Detect faces with OpenCV DNN, crop to face ROI, resize to 224x224, and skip frames without faces.",
   144→)
   145→face_confidence = st.slider(
   146→    "Face detection confidence",
   147→    min_value=0.3,
   148→    max_value=0.95,
   149→    value=float(st.session_state["prepare_face_confidence"]),
   150→    step=0.05,
   151→    key="prepare_face_confidence",
   152→    disabled=not face_crop,
   153→)
   154→split_run = st.toggle(
   155→    "Split run into train_ds/valid_ds",
   156→    key="prepare_split_run",
   157→    help="When enabled, move frames into train_ds_<run_id> and valid_ds_<run_id> after extraction.",
   158→)
   159→split_train_ratio = st.slider(
   160→    "Split train ratio",
   161→    min_value=0.5,
   162→    max_value=0.95,
   163→    value=float(st.session_state["prepare_split_train_ratio"]),
   164→    step=0.05,
   165→    key="prepare_split_train_ratio",
   166→    disabled=not split_run,
   167→)
   168→strip_valid_labels = st.toggle(
   169→    "Strip valid_ds label prefixes",
   170→    key="prepare_strip_valid_labels",
   171→    disabled=not split_run,
   172→    help="Removes happy_/sad_/neutral_ prefixes from valid_ds filenames while keeping labels in manifests.",
   173→)
   174→persist_valid_metadata = st.toggle(
   175→    "Persist valid_ds metadata",
   176→    key="prepare_persist_valid_metadata",
   177→    disabled=not split_run,
   178→    help="Writes valid split frame rows to extracted_frame for run-level lineage/auditing.",
   179→)
   180→if dry_run and split_run:
   181→    st.caption("Dry run validates extraction only. Split/move and valid metadata persistence run when Dry run is OFF.")
   182→
   183→st.caption(
   184→    "Source videos are read from local folders: "
   185→    "`videos/train/happy`, `videos/train/sad`, `videos/train/neutral`."
   186→)
   187→
   188→
   189→def _trigger_prepare_run(*, mode: str = "inherit") -> None:
   190→    if mode == "live":
   191→        effective_dry_run = False
   192→    elif mode == "dry_run":
   193→        effective_dry_run = True
   194→    else:
   195→        effective_dry_run = dry_run
   196→
   197→    if mode == "live" and dry_run:
   198→        st.info("Dry run toggle is ON, but manual execute runs in live mode.")
   199→    if mode == "dry_run" and not dry_run:
   200→        st.info("Dry run toggle is OFF, but manual validate runs in dry-run mode.")
   201→    try:
   202→        corr_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
   203→        resp = api_client.prepare_run_frames(
   204→            run_id=run_id or None,
   205→            train_fraction=sample_fraction,
   206→            dry_run=effective_dry_run,
   207→            face_crop=face_crop,
   208→            face_target_size=224,
   209→            face_confidence=face_confidence,
   210→            split_run=split_run,
   211→            split_train_ratio=split_train_ratio,
   212→            strip_valid_labels=strip_valid_labels,
   213→            persist_valid_metadata=bool(split_run and persist_valid_metadata),
   214→            correlation_id=corr_id,
   215→            idempotency_key=corr_id,
   216→        )
   217→        if mode == "dry_run":
   218→            st.success(f"Manual validate plan completed for run: {resp.get('run_id', 'unknown')}")
   219→        elif effective_dry_run:
   220→            st.success(f"Dry-run validated frame dataset plan for run: {resp.get('run_id', 'unknown')}")
   221→        elif mode == "live":
   222→            st.success(f"Manual execute live completed for run: {resp.get('run_id', 'unknown')}")
   223→        else:
   224→            st.success(f"Prepared frame dataset for run: {resp.get('run_id', 'unknown')}")
   225→        st.json(resp)
   226→    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   227→        if "404 Client Error" in str(exc) and "prepare-run-frames" in str(exc):
   228→            st.error(
   229→                "Frame extraction endpoint is missing on the running backend. "
   230→                "Restart fastapi-media with module apps.api.app.main:app, then retry."
   231→            )
   232→        st.error(f"Frame extraction failed: {exc}")
   233→
   234→
   235→action_col1, action_col2, action_col3, action_col4, action_col5 = st.columns(5)
   236→with action_col1:
   237→    if st.button("Rebuild Manifests", use_container_width=True):
   238→        try:
   239→            resp = api_client.rebuild_manifest()
   240→            st.success("Manifest rebuild requested.")
   241→            st.json(resp)
   242→        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   243→            st.error(f"Manifest rebuild failed: {exc}")
   244→
   245→with action_col2:
   246→    if st.button("Prepare 10-Frame Run", use_container_width=True):
   247→        _trigger_prepare_run(mode="inherit")
   248→
   249→with action_col3:
   250→    if st.button("Manual Validate Plan", use_container_width=True):
   251→        _trigger_prepare_run(mode="dry_run")
   252→
   253→with action_col4:
   254→    if st.button("Manual Execute Live", use_container_width=True):
   255→        _trigger_prepare_run(mode="live")
   256→
   257→with action_col5:
   258→    if st.button("Generate New Run ID", use_container_width=True):
   259→        st.session_state["train_run_id"] = f"run_{(uuid.uuid4().int % 10000):04d}"
   260→        st.info("Generated run ID. Leave empty to auto-generate the next run_xxxx on the backend.")
   261→
   262→st.divider()
   263→st.subheader("Training Status")
   264→pipeline_id = st.text_input("Pipeline ID", value=st.session_state.get("train_run_id", ""))
   265→if st.button("Refresh Training Status"):
   266→    try:
   267→        run_payload = _as_dict(api_client.get_training_status(pipeline_id))
   268→        latest_payload = _as_dict(api_client.get_training_status("latest"))
   269→        col_run, col_latest = st.columns(2)
   270→        with col_run:
   271→            _render_status_panel(f"Run: {pipeline_id}", run_payload)
   272→        with col_latest:
   273→            _render_status_panel("Latest Snapshot", latest_payload)
   274→    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
   275→        st.error(f"Status fetch failed: {exc}")
   276→
